title: MDN WebXR Performance Guide
citation: MDN Web Docs. WebXR Performance Guide. Accessed 2026-05-03.
claims_supported: WebXR applications need memory and frame-performance optimization.
Avoiding frequent allocation/deallocation in per-frame loops is important for performance.
claims_not_supported: That a specific OpenClinXR triangle, texture, or draw-call budget has been validated on Quest 3.
That WebXR performance can be guaranteed without device testing.
